Il Fatto Quotidiano: “Molestava le atlete bambine quando non c’erano i genitori”: maestro di Taekwondo condannato per violenza sessuale Molestava le sue giovani allieve durante le sessioni di stretching, approfittando delle sessioni in assenza dei genitori: con questa accusa un insegnante di Taekwondo di 42 anni è stato condannato a 4 anni e 10 mesi di reclusione dal Tribunale di Rimini davanti al quale era accusato di violenza sessuale aggravata su quattro atlete minorenni. Il sostituto procuratore investito del caso – riportano l’edizione locale de il Resto del Carlino e il Corriere Romagna – aveva chiesto 11 anni. Secondo quanto ricostruito nelle indagini, le molestie sarebbero avvenute tra il 2018 e il 2020 durante gli allenamenti in una palestra di Cattolica, nel Riminese. L’uomo, con il pretesto di correggere le posizioni di stretching, avrebbe molestato le ragazzine approfittando delle sessioni in assenza dei genitori. L’indagine dei Carabinieri, coordinata dal Pubblico Ministero, è partita dal racconto spontaneo di due delle bambine alla madre e a un’insegnante. L’imputato ha sempre negato gli addebiti, sostenendo che le giovani avessero frainteso i suoi gesti. La difesa del 42enne, riporta sempre la stampa locale, presenterà appello una volta a conoscenza delle motivazioni della sentenza di primo grado. L'articolo “Molestava le atlete bambine quando non c’erano i genitori”: maestro di Taekwondo condannato per violenza sessuale proviene da Il Fatto Quotidiano. “It bothered the young female athletes when their parents weren’t there”: Taekwondo instructor convicted of sexual assault. He harassed his young pupils during stretching sessions, taking advantage of the sessions in the absence of their parents: a 42-year-old Taekwondo instructor was sentenced to 4 years and 10 months imprisonment by the Rimini Court, before which he was accused of aggravated sexual assault on four underage athletes. The deputy prosecutor handling the case – according to the local editions of *il Resto del Carlino* and *Corriere Romagna* – had requested 11 years. According to what was reconstructed in the investigations, the harassment occurred between 2018 and 2020 during training at a gym in Cattolica, in the Rimini area. The man, under the pretext of correcting stretching positions, harassed the young girls taking advantage of the sessions in the absence of their parents. The investigation by the Carabinieri, coordinated by the Public Prosecutor's Office, began with the spontaneous testimony of two of the girls to their mother and a teacher. The defendant always denied the charges, claiming that the young women had misunderstood his gestures. The defense of the 42-year-old, the local press reports, will appeal once the reasons for the first-instance judgment are known. "He harassed the young female athletes when their parents were not present": Taekwondo master convicted of sexual assault comes from *Il Fatto Quotidiano*. That blue and yellow suit was the worst. I tried to change it based on a safety issue - it doesn't breathe, so my team would routinely be soaking wet inside, a serious survival time hazard if we were ever separated from the ship! It is mandated because of floatation built in. The floatation isn't sufficient. And falling in the ocean is the wrong "focus hazard" on sea ice, you really want to plan for not falling in at all rather than encourage the mindset "if we fall in we will be OK".

Oh no, info dump time.. that Spot The Pigeon EP by Genesis is a real random thing. You won't find any of the tracks on their main catalogue albums It was released on 7" vinyl in 1977, basically outtakes from the Wind and Wuthering sessions, so was the last studio release to feature Steve Hackett. It did actually chart in the UK, reaching number 14. If you've never heard Pigeons, it's well worth tracking down, even if you dislike Genesis.. it's a great little song.

The restoration of the river Skjern was carried out from 1999 to 2002. It transformed 19 kilometers of channelized river into 26 kilometers of meandering river. The river valley changed rapidly from agricultural fields into meadows, with weeds typical of arable land displaced by natural wetland plants. Birds returned, along with otter, and the number of salmon coming to the Skjern River to spawn grew tenfold [PANL]. (4/n) [PANL] Pedersen, M. L., Andersen, J. M., Nielsen, K., & Linnemann, M. (2007). Restoration of Skjern River and its valley: project description and general ecological changes in the project area. Ecological Engineering 30(2), 131-144.
